executive_summary: Build workflow execution failed due to missing or inaccessible workflow configuration file. The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404, preventing any build attempt from starting. This is a critical configuration error that must be resolved before any Maven build can be executed.

errors.title: Workflow Configuration File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) is missing or inaccessible in the repository. The workflow dispatch API endpoint returned HTTP 404, indicating the workflow cannot be triggered.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={
errors.root_cause: The workflow file does not exist in the repository at the expected path, or the GitHub token lacks sufficient permissions to access/trigger the workflow, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No Maven builds can be executed until the workflow configuration is properly set up. This blocks all CI/CD automation, testing, and deployment processes.

steps: 1. Create .github/workflows directory if it doesn't exist
2. Add build.yml workflow file with proper Maven build configuration
4. Verify GitHub Actions is enabled for the repository
5. Confirm GitHub token has workflow and actions permissions

errors.title: GitHub Actions Permissions or Availability Issue
errors.description: The API request to trigger the workflow failed with 404, which may indicate insufficient token permissions or GitHub Actions being disabled for the repository.
errors.error_message: Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled.
errors.location: GitHub Repository Settings / API Token Permissions
errors.root_cause: Either the GitHub personal access token lacks the required 'workflow' and 'actions' scopes, or GitHub Actions is not enabled for this repository.
errors.impact: Prevents automated workflow triggering and CI/CD pipeline execution. Manual builds and deployments would be required as a workaround.

steps: 1. Check GitHub token scopes include 'workflow' and 'actions'
2. Verify GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings
3. Confirm the token has write access to the repository
4. Test workflow dispatch with updated token if needed

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Error classification completed for workflow configuration failure. No Maven build logs available as workflow never executed.
compliance_notes.security_implications: Token permissions should be reviewed to ensure least-privilege access while maintaining required workflow capabilities.

next_steps: 1. Create or restore .github/workflows/build.yml file with proper Maven build configuration
2. Verify GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings
3. Confirm GitHub token has required permissions (workflow, actions, repo)
4. Test workflow dispatch manually to verify configuration
5. Re-run automated build process after configuration is fixed
